new_example: The company is committed to maintaining an environment free from discrimination.
new_translation: Công ty cam kết duy trì môi trường không có sự phân biệt đối xử.

old_example: The manager showed obvious disdain for the team's poor performance during the international marketing and sales project yesterday morning recently today.
new_example: The manager showed obvious disdain for the team's poor performance.
new_translation: Quản lý đã thể hiện sự khinh thường trước năng lực kém của nhóm.

old_example: Passengers were told to wait for the announcement before trying to disembark from the international flight yesterday morning recently today.
new_example: Passengers were told to wait before trying to disembark.
new_translation: Hành khách được yêu cầu chờ trước khi xuống tàu.

old_example: The failure of the international project manage managed to disenchant several team members regarding the company's future growth plans recently today.
new_example: The project failure managed to disenchant several team members.
new_translation: Thất bại của dự án đã làm vài thành viên vỡ mộng.

old_example: The lawyer manage managed to disentangle the complex legal issues regarding the company's international trade and partnership agreement recently today.
new_example: The lawyer managed to disentangle the complex legal issues.
new_translation: Luật sư đã gỡ rối được các vấn đề pháp lý phức tạp.

old_example: Unauthorized personnel are strictly prohibited from trying to disfigure or damage any company property and international equipment globally today.
new_example: Unauthorized personnel are prohibited from trying to disfigure company property.
new_translation: Nhân viên không được quyền làm hư hại tài sản công ty.

old_example: The former manager was a disgrace to the company after he was accused of severe international professional misconduct recently today.
new_example: The former manager was a disgrace to the company.
new_translation: Cựu quản lý là một nỗi nhục của công ty.

old_example: The politician was criticized for his disgraceful behavior during the international trade talks held in London yesterday afternoon recently today.
new_example: The politician was criticized for his disgraceful behavior.
new_translation: Chính trị gia bị chỉ trích vì hành vi đáng xấu hổ.
